name: IdsEdwMdlPolCntrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT t.MDL_POL_CNTR_SK, t.MDL_DOC_ID, t.POL_NO, t.CNTR_ID, t.CNTR_EFF_DT, t.SRC_SYS_CD, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, t.MDL_DOC_SK, t.CNTR_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, t.CNTR_STTUS_ID, t.CNTR_TERM_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MDL_POL_CNTR t WHERE t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT cte.MDL_POL_CNTR_SK, cte.MDL_DOC_ID, cte.POL_NO, cte.CNTR_ID, cte.CNTR_EFF_DT, cte.SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte.MDL_DOC_SK, cte.CNTR_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, cte.CNTR_STTUS_ID, cte.CNTR_TERM_DT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte
